rationale: Educ. Code §1.007 addresses mandatory policy compliance for public schools and employees. It has no bearing on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal.
quote: A public elementary or secondary school, the school's governing body, and the school's employees shall implement and comply with each policy the school is required to adopt under this code or other law.
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
